title: PMW Extra!
description: This mod Completely Overhauls Protomanlys weather, adding storm features, quality of life features, and more!
body:
### 🌪️New Storm Behavior

- **High and low Precipitation Supercells** - Supercells no longer always have the same rain intensity, some supercells can have no rain and some can be completely rainwrapped. The storms rainfall also changes throughout its lifetime.
- **Variable Tornado Widths** - Tornado widths now change randomly throughout their lifetime, completely independent  of windspeed
  
- **Wobbling** - Tornadoes can now wobble left or right randomly, be careful...
  
- **Storm Revival** - Dying tornadoes have a chance to unexpectedly regain strength

- **Scaled Lightning** - Lightning frequency now correlates with storm intensity 

### 🍃 New Wind Behavior  
- **Enhanced Wind Damage** - Makes tornado damage More accurate, but also more destructive
  
- **Player Wind Damage** -  High winds can now damage players (90+ MPH)
  
- **Projectile Physics** - Arrows, ender pearls, and other projectiles are deflected by wind fields
  
- **Wind Feedback** - Your screen shakes with the intensity of the wind


## 🖥️**Commands**

New /storm commands that allow you to spawn storms with no size or wind speed limits. You can now also choose the X,Z coordinate of where you want the storm to be spawned

## ⚙️ Config

The Config can be used to change the following:
- tornado wobble intensity
- Wind player damage
- Storm revival Chance
- Projectile Wind intensity
- Screen Shake Intensity
- Enhanced tornado Damage (Toggle)
- Variable tornado widths (Toggle)
- Enhanced lightning (Toggle)


## 📋 Requirements

- **Protomanlys Weather** (obviously lol)
